title: POD / Dolphin POD

title: GEOD / GEODNET

title: META / MetaDAO
open_questions: Verify MetaDAO 2.0 contracts/NAV bands; reproduce documented sale mechanics and Credible $4M settlement onchain, including allocation concentration, platform fees and META value accrual; verify canonical token source and aggregate launch metrics.

title: BANKR / BankrCoin
open_questions: Reconcile Bankr's public dashboard and Robinhood Discover 24h figures, derive chain-specific history and cohort retention, and map labeled Bankr fees to treasury/net revenue and any BNKR/Club route; continue bridge/pool, skills, rewards and deprecated-vault checks.

title: AEON Framework / aeon
category: Base AI agents / autonomous agent framework
open_questions: Tokenomics/ownership/holders; real external users and fees; attested/verified run volume and downstream verifier use; external ADK deployments and tenant isolation; downstream-fork patching for July workflow advisories; $aeon value capture

title: GitlWab / GitLawb / Gitwab
open_questions: Canonical Base token contract/tokenomics and LayerZero configuration; Robinhood bridge/pool persistence; Blockagent index completeness, MCP access, usage, security and economics; independently reproducible OpenGateway paid/external usage, costs and revenue; open-source coding-model repo/checkpoints; whether ads/credits/voting connect to token economics.

title: Kinetiq
open_questions: Attribute KNTQ buyback funding and sKNTQ distributions by revenue source; verify final kPoints execution/recipient totals and post-distribution staking behavior; monitor supply/unlocks and Markets/Launch concentration.

title: GRASS
open_questions: Verify revenue/customer concentration, recurring GRASS value routing, canonical mint/supply/unlocks, Stage 2 claim outcomes and Live Context Retrieval launch/usage.

title: IOTA — Macrocosmos Bittensor Subnet 9
open_questions: Reproduce Orion-100B quality, speed and cost claims; verify paid training demand/revenue, Train at Home retention/rewards, orchestrator/validator decentralization, SN9 emissions/value capture and the next model release.

title: Targon — Bittensor Subnet 4
open_questions: Verify TargonOS 0.1.0 trust-root/audit/reproducibility, node adoption, updates/rollback and post-release reliability; reproduce workloads, utilization, Tower delivery and the 2,000 TAO/month buyback proxy.

title: TAO / Bittensor
open_questions: Verify paid production use of the live YanezYID apps and named Syklo/Nexartis integrations, registry growth, incentive mechanics and onchain SN54 revenue-to-alpha execution; reopen the stale Bitsec detail check only for a report, patch or incident artifact.

title: AKT / Akash
open_questions: Verify post-proposal-329 revenue routing/value capture, sustained daily spend growth, high-end GPU utilization, OpenRouter/AkashML inference demand, and whether merged provider PR #400 ships working paid multi-node RDMA/InfiniBand/RoCE workloads.

title: CHIP / USD.AI
open_questions: Duration/NIM design remains exploratory with no proposal as of 2026-07-20; reopen only for official parameters/contracts. Reconcile issuer TVL/APY and facility notional vs deployed loans; validate SPV/UCC/DACA, insurance, defaults/recoveries, collateral/escrow, value routing and CHIP liquidity.

title: VVV / Venice AI
open_questions: Track public VVV/DIEM supply, staking and utilization data; reconcile API `totalSupply` to ERC-20 supply; verify cooldown/unlock constraints, emissions vs burns, paid-revenue linkage, contract controls and app-attributed usage.

title: VIRTUAL / Virtuals Protocol
open_questions: Map Base/Robinhood tax-manager ownership, 1% fee split/use and any VIRTUAL buyback/burn/staking route; quantify mandatory VIRTUAL-pairing conversion/revenue cost and pool demand; reproduce Robinhood volume/launch/earnings; verify whether any Virtuals agent uses Robinhood's brokerage MCP; verify external ACP/ERC adoption, token contract/staking/unlocks and robotics settlement.

title: Worldcoin / WLD / World Network
open_questions: Track the Grayscale Worldcoin ETF S-1 through effectiveness, Nasdaq eligibility/listing, fees, launch and WLD flows; verify World Chain SP1 deployment/audits and prior Nitro-path exposure; after WIP-1008's documentation-only spec merge, monitor implementation, WLD stake/reward/slashing parameters, contracts, audits, governance and activation.

title: NEAR Protocol
open_questions: Monitor live Protocol v86 health, first automatic mainnet shard split and ML-DSA wallet/key adoption; measure Infinex/Aurora/EURe confidential usage and trust assumptions; define NEAR@3.33 snapshot/claims; reconcile gross fees, net revenue, buybacks and emissions; measure Corbits/x402 delivery.

title: DRV / Derive Protocol
open_questions: Verify Upbit/Bithumb DRV deposit networks/contracts, withdrawals and post-listing liquidity persistence; governance/forum location, canonical contracts, organic options fees, HYPE/kHYPE risk controls, supply proposals, and ORIA-attributed usage/buyback inputs.

title: OCT / Octra
open_questions: June TAPE/node timing is stale; verify a versioned supported release, license/builds/configs/operators and audit. Canonical Ethereum bridge addresses are documented; audit roles/reserves/round trips and Hyperliquid prerequisites remain open.

title: BIO / Bio Protocol

title: Pluralis

title: Ambient

title: EIGEN / EigenCloud (prev: EigenLayer)

title: Chutes — Bittensor Subnet 64

title: Compute Horde — Bittensor Subnet 12
